title: Random Item Generator
description: The Random generator plugin adds a fun twist to your Minecraft server by randomly giving items to selected players. You can control how, when, and what items drop-perfect for events, challenges, or just some extra chaos.
body:
# 🧨 RandomDrops

**Bring chaos or fun challenges to your server with random item drops!**

**RandomDrops is a lightweight Minecraft plugin that periodically gives random items to selected players. It's fully configurable — control the frequency, quantity, item types, and even how the items are delivered.**

## ✨ Features

- **🎯 Target specific players** – Only drop items for chosen players.
- **⏱️ Customizable drop intervals** – Set how often drops happen.
- **📦 Three drop modes** – Choose between normal, full stacks, or line mode (9-slot layout).
- **🧍 Everyone gets the same items** – Or not. Up to you.
- **🥚 Control whether spawn eggs drop.**
- **💬 Optional feedback messages** – Let players know what they got.
- **🎲 Luck Dupe System** – Chance-based item duplication.
- **🔧 Easy-to-use command system.**

## 🛠 Commands

```
/rd start                                      → Start the item drops.
/rd stop                                       → Stop the item drops.
/rd add <player>                               → Add a player to the drop list.
/rd remove <player>                            → Remove a player from the list.
/rd playerlist                                 → Show all players currently added.
/rd setting DropsInterval <t>                  → Set drop frequency (in ticks).
/rd setting Drops <n>                          → How many items are dropped per interval.
/rd setting DoEggsDrop <true/false>            → Toggle dropping of spawn eggs.
/rd setting DropMode <...>                     → Choose how items are delivered.
/rd setting SendItemFeedback <true/false>      → Enable/disable feedback.
/rd setting EveryoneSame <true/false>          → Give same items to all players.
/rd setting LuckDupe <true/false>              → Enable the duplication system.
/rd setting SendLuckDupeFeedback <true/false>  → Dupe message toggle.
/rd setting LuckDupeChance <...>               → Set dupe probability level.
/rd setting LuckDupeChances                    → Show dupe probabilities.
/rd reset                                      → Reset all settings to default.
/rd help                                       → Show help.
```

## 💖 Support

If you'd like to support me:
